snapshots.sections_text:
PART: Tasks
NAME: Tasks
STATUS: draft

WHEN: Add Task
MARKER: add_task
INTENT: user adds a new task
TAGS: #form, #list, #task, #user
---
When the user taps the add button, a form appears. The user fills in the title and confirms. The new task appears at the top of the list.

WHEN: Complete Task
MARKER: complete_task
INTENT: user marks a task as done
TAGS: #card, #list, #task, #user
---
When the user taps the checkbox on a task card, the task status changes to complete. The card moves to the bottom of the list with a strikethrough style.

ASSERT: Task Title
MARKER: task_title
INTENT: validation for task title
TAGS: #task
---
A task title cannot be empty.

SURFACE: Task Card
MARKER: task_card
INTENT: labels and styles for task cards
TAGS: #card, #date, #task
---
The task card displays the title, shows a checkbox for completion, and includes the creation date. Completed tasks have a strikethrough style.

DATA: Task List
MARKER: task_list
INTENT: holds all tasks and their state
TAGS: #date, #list, #task
---
The app holds a list of tasks. Each task has a title, a completion status, and a creation date.

STRUCTURE: Task Screen
MARKER: task_screen
INTENT: the main screen showing all tasks
TAGS: #list, #task
---
The screen has a top bar with the app name, a scrollable list of task cards, and a floating add button in the bottom right.

SURFACE: Task Screen
MARKER: task_screen
INTENT: the main screen showing all tasks
TAGS: #list, #task
---
The screen has a top bar with the app name, a scrollable list of task cards, and a floating add button in the bottom right. Additionally, the screen always displays a label saying "YAAAY" at the top.
